/usr/bin/ar qc libsystem.a CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/binary.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/bitmath.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/cmdline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/constexpr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/cpuaccel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/Error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/event.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/filestream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/Fraction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/function.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/halffloat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/int128.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/linearalloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/refcount.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/registrymemory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/stdaccel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/stdafx.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/strutil.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/thread.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/tls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/vdalloc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/vdstl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/vdstl_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/vdstl_hashtable.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/VDString.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/vectors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/zip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/date_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/debug_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/error_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/file_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/fileasync_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/filesys_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/registry_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/text_sdl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/system.dir/source/time_sdl3.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libsystem.a
